title: English 900
subtitle: 900 high-value spoken English lines with Chinese translations
description: A progressive speaking course built for real-world communication, independent daily life, university study, social connection, academic discussion, and long-term study-abroad growth.

groups.title: First Weeks and Everyday Confidence
groups.focus: Clear, natural survival English for meeting people, asking for help, moving around, paying, and fixing small misunderstandings.

groups.title: Daily Life, Routines, and Local Independence
groups.focus: Useful everyday English for living independently: routines, errands, housework, phone tasks, scheduling, weather, and neighborhood life.

groups.title: Food, Shopping, and Everyday Choices
groups.focus: Practical and expressive English for ordering, cooking, shopping, budgeting, preferences, returns, and small negotiations.

groups.title: Housing, City Life, and Moving Around
groups.focus: Independent city English for renting, repairs, neighbors, safety, utilities, travel, transport delays, and finding your place in a new environment.

groups.title: Social Life, Feelings, and Real Conversation
groups.focus: Natural conversation for invitations, friendship, stories, opinions, humor, boundaries, conflict, feelings, culture, and deeper connection.

groups.title: Health, Services, and Solving Problems
groups.focus: Calm, precise English for symptoms, pharmacies, doctors, mental health, banks, public offices, complaints, technology problems, lost items, and emergencies.

groups.title: University Life and Classroom Confidence
groups.focus: English for enrollment, lectures, office hours, classmates, assignments, study habits, exams, library work, campus services, and speaking up in class.

groups.title: Academic Discussion, Projects, and Critical Thinking
groups.focus: Stronger spoken English for research questions, evidence, argument, seminars, presentations, feedback, collaboration, data, ethics, and nuanced disagreement.

groups.title: Study Abroad, Career, and Mature Conversation
groups.focus: Flexible, reflective English for adaptation, identity, culture shock, interviews, internships, leadership, negotiation, values, future plans, and confident self-expression.

groups.title: IELTS Speaking C1 Practice Set
groups.focus: Natural, high-level speaking practice for IELTS-style conversation across everyday, academic, and personal topics.
